notes.text: Type 2 diabetes remains active. Patient reports fasting glucose usually 130-150. Continue metformin and nutrition counseling. No kidney assessment is documented in this diabetes plan.
Patient has chronic kidney disease stage 3. Etiology is not specified in this note. No statement links CKD to diabetes in the assessment.
Active problems include Type 2 diabetes mellitus, hypertension, chronic low back pain, and hyperlipidemia. Historical kidney disease appears in imported chart history without current assessment.
Patient denies chest pain, dyspnea, dysuria, flank pain, and lower-extremity edema. No renal assessment is documented in this section.
Renal function panel shows eGFR 42. The lab result supports reduced kidney function but does not identify the cause or connect the result to diabetes.
Hypertension is controlled. Continue lisinopril and low-sodium diet. Diabetes and kidney disease are not assessed in this encounter.
Refilled metformin, atorvastatin, and lisinopril. Refill note does not document CKD stage, diabetes complications, or a diabetes-CKD relationship.
Reminder placed for diabetic eye exam and A1c follow-up. No renal monitoring plan is documented in this reminder.
